recent_events.task: Refine NCH flask back typography and QR treatment
recent_events.summary: Updated latest Figma production master page 226:2 in file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey after user correction. Back-panel typography for 250ml node 226:18 and 500ml node 226:134 now uses Cinzel Bold across headline, instructions, QR labels, phone, Instagram/website, statutory and legal text because Figma MCP exposes Cinzel Regular/Bold/Black only; exact Cinzel SemiBold load attempts failed. Replaced hard-edged QR treatment with newly generated rounded NCH branded QR PNGs using cream card, dark-brown dots, gold inset edge, and gift-center mark. Assigned new image hashes e797d35fd291ad293f349a4860aff19776224638 for WhatsApp /go/flask and 14306893f4c5e909b8d650d19fcd1a9bc242bf3b for Google review.
recent_events.next_action: If Nihaf requires exact Cinzel SemiBold rather than available Cinzel Bold, install/enable Cinzel SemiBold in Figma and rerun font pass; otherwise continue visual refinement on page 226:2, then export/preflight vendor PDFs after approval.
recent_events.mutation_status: Existing Figma file mutation only; generated temp QR assets in /private/tmp; no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final files or live site routes changed.
recent_events.proof: Figma readback confirmed all text layers in back nodes 226:18 and 226:134 use Cinzel Bold. QR readback confirmed four QR fills use new hashes e797d35fd291ad293f349a4860aff19776224638 and 14306893f4c5e909b8d650d19fcd1a9bc242bf3b at 116x116 with cornerRadius 11. zbarimg decoded final Figma back screenshots to https://nawabichaihouse.com/go/flask and https://g.page/r/CQozT6UxiKIGEBM/review.

recent_events.task: Create NCH flask 250ml and 500ml consistent production master board
recent_events.summary: Created existing-file Figma production master page 'Codex Production Master 250ml 500ml Consistent' in cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey. The board contains 250ml approved locked front, 250ml editable back v6, 250ml spines/gables, and 500ml front/back/spines/gables adapted from the same approved 250ml visual grammar: kraft/chamoisee base, cream-gold side filigree, serif hierarchy, dual QR back system, dark legal footer. Older plain 500ml front is retained only as a faded source/dieline reference because it did not match the approved 250ml front strongly enough.
recent_events.next_action: Review page 226:2 in Figma, approve or adjust visual placements, then run final vendor export pass: hide nonprint guides, export SVG/PDF per panel, qpdf/pdfinfo dimension checks, QR decode/live route checks, phone/legal/FSSAI proof, and dieline/bleed verification before vendor handoff.

recent_events.task: Initialize lane and verify NCH flask review state
recent_events.summary: Re-read packaging-design lane memory, packaging prompt, Claude execution digest, marketing graph state, creative asset library registry, and decisions log. Confirmed repo checkout is on claude/captain-pos-guard with unrelated dirty tracked work, so no repo edit/stage is safe from this lane. Figma file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey is readable/writable through use_figma and contains page 197:2 'Codex Final 250ml Front Back Editable' with locked front, locked back v5, editable back v6, and Gemini concept frames. Downloaded/visually inspected review screenshot at /private/tmp/nch_figma_review_page_20260528.png. Source front and back v5 PDFs qpdf-clean and both page size 385.512 x 612.283 pt (136x216mm). QR PNGs decode: WhatsApp dynamic to https://nawabichaihouse.com/go/flask and Google review to https://g.page/r/CQozT6UxiKIGEBM/review. Live check shows /go/flask currently returns the NCH homepage, not a dedicated flask/claim WhatsApp redirect, and homepage links point to wa.me/918008002045 while print art says +91 74832 70215.
recent_events.next_action: Before vendor-final output, either fix/verify the /go/flask route to the intended flask claim WhatsApp destination and confirm phone/legal/FSSAI text, or have Nihaf explicitly approve keeping the homepage route. After approval, adjust editable back v6 placements if needed, then run final deterministic SVG/PDF/QR/bleed/dieline vendor checks.
recent_events.mutation_status: Read-only verification and memory writeback only; no Figma mutation, no repo mutation, no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final file mutation, no bulk dielines.
recent_events.proof: Figma page 197:2 verified via use_figma; screenshot /private/tmp/nch_figma_review_page_20260528.png; qpdf/pdfinfo passed for front and back v5 print PDFs; zbarimg decoded both QR PNGs; curl -I -L confirmed Google review resolves to write-review page and /go/flask returns 200 homepage.
